_description: Reproduction fixture for G7 (Gemma 4 empty-content tool-call assistant turn closure). The assistant's tool-call message has empty content but a matching tool_response follows. Upstream Gemma 4 templates suppress the <turn|> close marker in this case, leading to an infinite tool-call loop. Patched templates emit <turn|>.

messages.content: What is the weather in Tokyo?

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Get the current weather for a city
